label: Arctic and alpine
description: Tundra and alpine systems including Antarctic terrestrial dry-valley sites.

label: Arid land
description: Hot and cold deserts, semi-arid shrublands.

label: Coastal
description: Coastal and estuarine systems including coral-reef and kelp-forest sites.

label: Eastern forest
description: Mixed deciduous and pine forests east of the Mississippi.

label: Western forest
description: Conifer-dominated forests west of the Mississippi, including Pacific Northwest old-growth.

label: Temperate grassland and savanna
description: Tallgrass, mixedgrass, and shortgrass prairie; oak savanna.

label: Urban
description: Urban ecosystems with associated suburban and exurban gradient.

label: Boreal forest
description: Taiga / boreal coniferous forest, primarily Alaska.

label: Tropical / subtropical moist forest
description: Caribbean and Pacific-island moist forest (e.g. Luquillo).

label: Agroecosystem
description: Cropping or rangeland systems under long-term agricultural management.

label: Glacier / icefield
description: Glaciers, icefields, and ice sheets monitored as discrete systems.
